requirement_or_principle: AI governance structures, policies, accountability, and risk management processes are established.
evidence_required: Completed intake record and approval decision

requirement_or_principle: AI context, intended use, stakeholders, benefits, and risks are documented.
evidence_required: Approved model card or system card

requirement_or_principle: Risks are analyzed using repeatable metrics and test methods.
Risks are prioritized, treated, monitored, and escalated.
AI risks are identified across lifecycle, data, model, operations, and stakeholders.
Impact and likelihood are assessed to estimate risk level.
Controls and mitigation actions are selected, owned, and tracked.
AI management system scope and use-case inventory are maintained.
Accountable owners and approvers are assigned.
Operational controls are implemented for AI systems.
Production models are monitored for performance, drift, exceptions, and issues.
Personal information use is minimized, justified, consent-aligned, and reviewed.
Vendor AI systems are reviewed for data handling, auditability, security, and contractual controls.
